controls.name: 06.d Data Protection and Privacy of Covered Information
controls.llm_proposal: Yes, this control is expected to be implemented because the listed modules handle PHI and must comply with HITRUST data protection and privacy requirements.

controls.name: 09.l Backup
controls.llm_proposal: Yes, this control is expected to be implemented because the listed modules handle PHI and require backup procedures to ensure data availability and integrity.

retrieval_steps.description: Infra Terraform (backup_retention_period, snapshot, aws_backup, S3 lifecycle)

controls.name: 06.h Data Retention and Disposal
controls.llm_proposal: Yes, this control is expected to be implemented because the listed modules handle PHI and must enforce data retention schedules and secure disposal procedures.

controls.name: 09.aa Audit Logging
controls.llm_proposal: Yes, this control is expected to be implemented because audit logging is essential for tracking access and modifications to PHI across the numerous modules that handle protected health information.

evidence.match: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_log (
evidence.detail: logging detected but incomplete; missing essentials: user identifier, timestamp / date-time, function or action performed

locations.match: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_log (

controls.name: 01.q User Identification and Authentication
controls.llm_proposal: Yes, because these modules access or process PHI and must enforce user identification and authentication to ensure only authorized users can access sensitive data.

controls.name: 01.b Session Management / Timeout
controls.llm_proposal: Yes, this control is expected to be implemented because the listed modules handle PHI and require session timeout enforcement to prevent unauthorized access.
